title: acantholimon bracteatum var. capitatum
intro: Acantholimon bracteatum var. capitatum, also known as the mountain sandwort, is a perennial plant species within the Plumbaginaceae family, commonly found in mountainous regions. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, attributed to its high concentration of alkaloids and flavonoids. The plant is said to offer several health benefits, such as soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems. Acantholimon bracteatum var. capitatum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, often in combination with other herbs, to harness its medicinal properties.
